refactorings_applied: Extract magic constants (MAX_GROUP_COLLAPSED_KEYS, DANGEROUS_KEYS) to module-level named constants
Export parseGroupCollapsed for direct unit testing with @internal annotation
Add 6 comprehensive unit tests for parseGroupCollapsed (valid input, invalid JSON, non-object values, prototype pollution, non-boolean filtering, key limit)
Add double-click prevention test for SyncButton (isSyncingRef guard verification)
commits: a957cec: refactor(sidebar): improve parseGroupCollapsed testability and add comprehensive tests
message: Refactoring complete. Sidebar.tsx line coverage improved from 81.72% to 94.62%. Extracted magic constants, exported parseGroupCollapsed for direct testing, added 7 new tests covering prototype pollution protection, input validation, key limits, and SyncButton double-click prevention.
